description: STING Device Coordination rule pack (Phase 192 B4, A1 §7). Coordinates device locations against doors, casework, art/specialty and decorative lighting using bounding-box + wall-host geometry only (cheap + robust, not a full clash run). Corporate starter baseline; project overlay at <project>/_BIM_COORD/device_coord_rules.json, merged by id. Rule types: clearance (device planar gap to obstacle < minClearanceMm), overlap (device AABB overlaps obstacle AABB in plan), mountingHeight (per-room device Z outliers beyond alignmentToleranceMm from the room median), doorSwing (device on the door's swing side within minClearanceMm). sameWallOnly limits clearance/overlap to device+obstacle hosted on the same wall. Severity BLOCK/WARN/INFO.

rules.description: Switch/outlet on the door swing (hinge) side is obstructed by the open leaf — relocate to the strike side.
Devices must keep ≥100 mm clearance from casework/furniture so the plate is not buried behind a unit.
Switches/outlets/data within a room should sit at a consistent mounting height (±50 mm of the room median).
Wall sensors/thermostats within a room should sit at a consistent mounting height (±75 mm of the room median).
A device must not overlap art/specialty equipment on the same wall.
Fire-alarm sounders/beacons should keep ≥300 mm from decorative luminaires for visibility + access.
